scene.description: A bold vertical TikTok end-card CTA screen for a street food event. Clean, modern, high-energy.

background.type: solid vibrant green background, hex color #16a34a, with a subtle radial gradient lighter in the center

text_elements.style: massive bold white uppercase text, the biggest text on the image
text_elements.font_style: ultra bold condensed sans-serif, like Impact or Bebas Neue

text_elements.style: dark text on a white rounded pill-shaped button, bold
white bold small uppercase text on a slightly darker green strip

decorative_elements.position: top center, above the main headline

branding.overall_style: clean, bold, high-energy CTA card. Like a concert ticket confirmation. Simple and punchy.

exclusions: special characters or symbols that could be garbled
must_include: all text must be plain English with standard punctuation only, use hyphens not bullet points
